programme.title: Lights of Old Sante Fe
programme.desc: In this musical western Marjorie Brooks Dale Evans is the owner and operator of a rodeo thats an antiquated touring company on its last legs Her business rival Frank Madden Richard Powers offers to combine their operations if the lovely Marjorie will be his bride Though she initially rebuffs his proposal a canceled booking tips the scales and forces Marjorie to accept But rodeo rider Roy Rogers Roy Rogers suspects Frank is behind Marjories troubles and sets out to investigate

programme.title: Broadway to Cheyenne
programme.desc: A cowboy detective goes up against a gang of big-city thugs trying to set up a protection racket out west

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Grape 124
programme.desc: Grape 124

programme.title: Hong 105
programme.desc: Hong 105

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Gadget is sent to Romanavia to retrieve the royal seal that has been stolen by MAD

programme.title: Hair Bear Bunch
programme.desc: While auditioning for the parts of the three bears in Goldilocks and the Three Bears Peevly catches up with them

programme.title: The Bullwinkle
programme.desc: The Bullwinkle

programme.title: The Bullwinkle
programme.desc: The Bullwinkle

programme.title: 1987 Budweiser Columbia Cup Tri-Cities WA
programme.desc: 1987 Budweiser Columbia Cup Tri-Cities WA

programme.title: Hydroplane Racing
programme.desc: Hydroplane Racing

programme.title: Sea Battles
programme.desc: Sea Battles

programme.title: Follow The Flag
programme.desc: The Flag Marine Corps Documentary

programme.title: Man of the Forest
programme.desc: The kidnapping of an heir to a ranch goes awry when the Man of the Forest mistrusted by the heiress takes matters into his own hands with the help of his pet cougar

programme.title: In Old Sante Fe
programme.desc: Kentucky loses his horse in a rigged horse race and gets framed for the murder of a stagecoach driver

programme.title: Song of the Gringo
programme.desc: Several miners are killed and their mines are confiscated by a mysterious person Tex an undercover cop is asked to investigate the murders However Tex ends up being implicated as a criminal

programme.title: Rollin Plains
programme.desc: Its cattlemen versus sheepmen and Trigger Gargan appears to be the leader of the gang causing the trouble But unknown to Ranger Tex Lawrence the respected town citizen Barrow is the boss and is tipping off the gang as to the Rangers activities

programme.title: The Mystery of the Hooded Horsemen
programme.desc: In a small frontier mining town a gang of outlaws in black hoods is running roughshod over locals presiding over a reign of terror Tex Tex Ritter and Stubby Horace Murphy take up the dying wish of Tom Lafe McKee a kindly rancher killed by the gang to capture the marauders Knowing that the survival of the local mine and the heart of Toms sweet daughter Iris Meredith are on the line Tex and Stubby go undercover in the gang hoping to bring them down from the inside

programme.title: Lawmen
programme.desc: While celebrating in an inebriated state a group of cattlemen inadvertently kill an old man in Bannock The righteous marshal of the town vows to punish them

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: After playing a riddle game Captain N Princess Lana and Simon get a call from Mayor Squaresly that Tetris is in trouble so they go and check it out while the Puzzle King plans to rule Tetris

programme.title: Forever Knight
programme.desc: The next of kin to the citys biggest crime family is determined to leave the family business to live a normal life However family ties are not easily broken and LaCroix is sought for his help

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: Micki and Ryan race to find an old World Series ring that enables its owner to see gambling results before they happen

programme.title: The Return
programme.desc: In New Mexico an alien spacecraft abducts two young children and an old man 25 years later the children are returned as adults to the same town now beset by strange cattle mutilations

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: Billys mother has remarried She Billy and his new stepfather move into their new house on Mothers Day The house is in Springwood The stepfather has a difficult temper and Billy wants more attention from his mother As soon as they arrive they leave Billy alone since they are going on their honeymoon Then he meets his new neighbor the beautiful Barbara who convinces him to organize a party whose outcome will be fatal Meanwhile a radio psychologist finds herself in trouble when she gives bad advice to her listeners She is Barbaras mother and is obsessed with her job as a radio celebrity and needs to put her daughter first

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: When an abusive agent learns that his sexy model of a girlfriend is cheating on him with a photographer he kills him and later kidnaps his girlfriend but soon learns the love is more powerful in death

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: A greedy rock promoter tries to steal the money raised at a benefit concert when his conscience intervenes

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Lovely young invalid Meg Kinderly has to fend for herself after she gets trapped in her spacious family mansion with a vicious killer who has just wiped out most of her family and all of the servants But things arent that simple

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Reverend Nolan Powers is a fire and brimstone evangelist who has achieved tremendous fame wealth and power from his radio program thats broadcast on a national basis from his station WGOD A team of TV journalists do a story on Powers and his increasing popularity with the masses However a long-suppressed shameful secret from his dark family past threatens to destroy Powers and his current high profile status

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Taking a job with the railroad Eric meets and befriends a former prize fighter who was a childhood idol of his who is on the run from the mob after he refused to throw a fight But a bar-room brawl draws the mobs attention to the man

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric tracks Skorzney to a shadowy boatyard and begins to keep a journal He steals a revolver and gets some silver bullets hoping to kill Skorzney to end the curse But Eric is captured by sailors who plan to turn him over to Alamo Joe

programme.title: Forever Knight
programme.desc: A parole officer is Nicks prime suspect in a murder investigation until the suspect nearly becomes the next victim

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Wilbur hires a bumbling handyman to fix up the house in anticipation of a visit from Home Beautiful Magazine and Ed wants new shoes

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: Nearby war games inspire Hogan to replace some of the blank German ammunition with live ammo using Klinks birthday as a diversion

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan nixes a mission to destroy a synthetic fuel plant because the caper is too riskybut he is overruled - and forced to participate in the scheme by the ploys mastermind a strong-willed determined female scientist

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: Binghamton devises a deceitful plan to have McHale chosen for the position of Liaison Officer at British Fleet HQ in Australia Parker and The Crew unwittingly help McHale to get the job then must scheme to get him off the hook when they find out that they wont be going along

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: With McHale and his Crew presumably killed in action publicity-hungry Binghamton plays the part of the grieving Commanding Officer when a War Correspondent comes to Taratupa looking for a big story But when McHale and the Crew turn up very much alive and well Binghamton must cooperate with McHale to work up a cover story

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: When Gomers cousin Goober shows up in the barracks and puts on one of Gomers uniforms and then wanders the base everyone sees the name Pyle on the uniform and thinks Gomer is losing his mind

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Gomer starts dating Sergeant Carters sister Carter is determined to break them up

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: The Skipper trains Gilligan to be his replacement leader in case he is captured by savages But when The Skipper is actually captured by savages can Gilligan actually take control

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: The rock band The Mosquitoes arrive on the island for some much-needed RR But the castaways try to make their lives miserable so theyll want to leave--and take them with them

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: When novice driver Kate mistakenly believes that she has damaged the family car her heartfelt efforts to make amends cause the real culprit Grandpa to become increasingly conscience-stricken

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: After Grandpa tells Little Luke and his friends an exciting but untrue story about serving with Teddy Roosevelt in the Spanish-American War he is invited to appear as a guest of honor at a public Veterans Day celebration

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: KAOS is going to stop Smart from testifying against one of their agents

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Max must hold a séance to get information from a dead informer

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: B J McKay a guitar-playing independent trucker who travels with a fun-loving chimpanzee named Bear finds himself caught up with a bunch of young women trying to flee a white slaver who happens to be the local sheriff The Foundlings part 1

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Mister Ed wins 100 in Wilburs name when he correctly answers a contest question over the telephone Wilbur now has a chance to win 5000 but hes going to need Eds help

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Dangerous Crossing
programme.desc: A recently married heiress Ruth Stanton Jeanne Crain embarks on a honeymoon cruise with her new husband John Bowman Carl Betz However shortly after getting on board John disappears None of the crew remember seeing him and the ships manifest has Ruth registered alone and under her maiden name Ruth wanders the boat in search of John but soon the captain and crew believe Ruth must be crazy Only kindly Dr Manning Michael Rennie takes her seriously and helps unravel the mystery

programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Quimby instructs Gadget to retrieve a powerful microcomputer from MAD that is capable of teleportation

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Gadget is sent to the Arab Emirate of Yatzanistan to protect Prince Akars sacred sword from falling into the wrong hands

programme.title: The Disappearance Thriller
programme.desc: Thriller about a contract killer whose wife has disappeared When he is hired by an international organization to carry out a shy or hit he suspects they are connected with her disappearance

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: The Alphans encounter the Voyager space probe that has been wandering the cosmos propelled by the Queller drive- a faulty engine system Following the probe is a fleet of alien ships from a world devastated by the drive

programme.title: Nightbreed
programme.desc: A troubled young man is drawn to a mythical place called Midian where a variety of friendly monsters are hiding from humanity Meanwhile a sadistic serial killer is looking for a patsy

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: While stopped at the Boars Nest Loretta Lynn is kidnapped by a trio who want her to offer tips about breaking into the music business

programme.title: Hercules 210
programme.desc: Hercules 210

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: Using Jiridian technology scientists create a physical bio surrogates where a human consciousness can be transferred When a surrogate escapes they must find it before it uses its fighting and weapons knowledge

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: The Blackwood team consults with noted linguist Adrian Bouchard Cedric Smith to decipher the aliens transmissions

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: When an attempt on Dr Alec Hollands life leaves him consumed by deadly chemicals and fire the swamps of Louisiana transform him into a superhuman creature hell-bent on ridding the swamp--and the world--of the evil that men do

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: Dr Kimble still fleeing with the woman he loves decides to fake their deaths at sea hoping it will fool Lt Gerard forever

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: Richard Kimble helps a black boxer realize that he may have a brain injury that will kill him if he continues to box Meanwhile an undercover police Sgt closes in on Kimble

programme.title: BIg Valley
programme.desc: The sociopathic son of a neighbor recently returned from away stirs up serious trouble for the Barclays

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: When a young boy is trapped in a cave-in the locals think the Sioux took him in retribution when Cheyennes Sioux friend is found with the boys horse Cheyenne must prove the truth but a hardcore sheriff doesnt believe him

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: Keller goes undercover as a draft dodger to investigate an AWOL Marines murder

programme.title: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: Taggert a US industrialist has acquired a jade figure which has great religious significance to Kuala Rokat That nation is a small but strategically located nation which borders China Taggerts acquisition threatens to undo years of sensitive US diplomacy but there is no legal way to force him to give the figure back Phelps devises a plan which among other things calls for causing havoc with Taggerts mainframe computer Rollin impersonating an academic from Kuala Rokat and using a highly trained cat in getting the jade away from Taggert

programme.title: American Flyers
programme.desc: Marcus takes his kid brother David with him for a physical test and a brain scan suspecting cerebral aneurysm like their dad died of They head off on bikes for the big Rockies bike race with Marcus Sarah driving the van

programme.title: Battle Beyond The Stars
programme.desc: Shad of Akir Richard Thomas recruits a space cowboy George Peppard and other warriors to defend his planet from a barbarians army

programme.title: Prophecy
programme.desc: A government health inspector is dispatched to assess the damage a logging company is causing to a patch of forest claimed by Native Americans and comes face to face with true terror wreaking havoc in the woods

programme.title: Day of the Dead
programme.desc: Trapped in a missile silo a small team of scientists civilians and trigger-happy soldiers battle desperately to ensure the survival of the human race but tension inside the base is reaching breaking-point and the zombies are gathering outside

programme.title: Out of the Blue

programme.title: Captain Newman MD
programme.desc: In 1944 an Army doctor is in charge of a neuropsychiatric ward at an Army Air Corps hospital in Arizona and he must deal with a variety of tough cases

programme.title: Away All Boats
programme.desc: The story of a US Naval ship and its crew in the Pacific from 1943 to 1945

programme.title: A Day in October
programme.desc: This story based on fact is about the movement of Danish Jews out of Denmark to neutral Sweden in the 1940s It focuses on a single family and tells of their involvement with the underground and of their own initially reluctant participation in sabotaging a munitions plant and of the daughters affection for one of the movements leaders

programme.title: The Horror at 37000 Feet
programme.desc: An invisible demon in the cargo hold of a jet airliner terrorizes the passengers

programme.title: Freddys Return A Nightmare Reborn
programme.desc: As a child Kevin was kidnapped by Freddy Krueger before Freddy was killed by a mob of angry parents Although he was rescued by the detective that arrested Krueger he was left scarred emotionally and psychologically 13 years have passed and Kevins family has moved back to Elm Street stirring up Kevins darkest memories A weakened desperate Freddy trapped in the dream world by his mother a nun named Sister Mary Helena following the events of Nightmare 5 has caught Kevins scent the one that got away

programme.title: Demons 2
programme.desc: Various residents of a high-rise apartment building are watching a film being broadcast on television The films story follows several teens who trespass into a city that was deserted and walled-off due to the Demon outbreak from the first film Finding the demons corpse one of the teens revives it accidentally when blood drips from a scratch into the demons mouth

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Out of the Cage reveals the private thoughts and emotions of an MMA fighter, the ambition that drives them and how they are affected when encountering defeat or facing triumph. Featuring Tom Theocharis at HK50

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Todd Johnston was a well known competitor in Martial Arts, and has since devoted his time to helping other aspiring fighters achieve their goals. Under Todd's tutelage, several Hard Knocks fighters have gone above and beyond what they set out to accomplish.

programme.desc: Moses Murrietta v. Andrey Seledtsov

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Diego Gonzalez v. Matt Thorpe

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: A private pre-season event held in a secret warehouse in Budapest, Hungary, the inaugural Karate Combat: Genesis event took place on February 3, 2018. The event showcases the incredible depth of the fight roster highlighting many karate legends in various weight classes, competing for the first time ever in this new sporting league.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Khadija Charradi v. Essilia Wurms

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Mindaugas Mikaliak v. Adrian Kubiak

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: The Premier MMA promotion, Telecast live across the globe Showcasing some of the worlds best MMA athletes.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Hard Knocks 43 continues to bring you some of the best fights in MMA! This episode features the amateur matchup of debut Kyle Messenger vs. Patrick 'Cyborg' Leblanc. Also in his amateur debut, Nick Felber faces Tyler Kobayashi. The pro card begins with Trenton Rowell vs. former Light Heavyweight and Heavyweight Amateur Champion, Devon ""Mr. Boomtruck"" Smith. Capping this show is an exciting Light Heavyweight Title Fight between Misha Cirkunov defending his title against challenger Shaun Asher. You do not want to miss it!

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Abubakar Mestoev v. Alexey Makhno

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: The excitement never ends at Hard Knocks 43! Watch top Wrestler Justin Basra battle it out against Jason Fournier. Ryan Connor faces Owen Carr from Team Alpha Male in this exciting match displaying high level Jiu Jitsu skills.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: A private pre-season event held in a secret warehouse in Budapest, Hungary, the inaugural Karate Combat: Genesis event took place on February 3, 2018. The event showcases the incredible depth of the fight roster highlighting many karate legends in various weight classes, competing for the first time ever in this new sporting league.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Michele Mirabella v. Chris Stebbeds

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: The School of Hard Knocks 21 filmed at the Century Casino in Calgary. Professional and Amateur fighters from across North America battle it out in the cage. David Swanson v. Matt Zemlak.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Live from Hollywood, CA on January 24, 2019, Karate Combat: Hollywood kicks off Karate Combat's sophomore season. Held at the Avalon, the former Hollywood Palace building, near the famous intersection of Hollywood and Vine. Jonas Correia v. Luis Diogo

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Giacomo Pala v. Craig Daly

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Reda Messaoudi v. Nikos Kosmas.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Pouria Rashidi v. Dominic Dillon

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Professional and Amateur fighters from across North America battle it out in Hard Knocks' cage. Cody Clarke v. Bryce Berry.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: MMA Veteran Nick Thompson goes up against the brute force of wrestling star Davion Peterson. Thompson has more pro fight experience than anyone on the first series, and will need all of it to hold his own against the relentless Peterson.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Chris Chapman v. Scott MacDonald

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: The big dogs go at it, as heavyweight Mario “The Big Hurt” Rinaldi puts his stellar record on the line against the hard-working, hard-fighting and hard-living Mark Burch. Rinaldi has never lost, and Burch has been defeated just one, so neither man will give an inch.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: The Premier MMA promotion, Telecast live across the globe Showcasing some of the worlds best MMA athletes.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: James Saville v. Martin Sheridan

programme.title: Irish Breakdown
programme.desc: Irish Breakdown provides unmatched in-depth analysis of the Notre Dame Football program while also discussing hot college football topics.

programme.title: Bleav in Panthers
programme.desc: Panthers great, Running Back Jonathan Stewart, is joined by Tobacco Road Sports Radio's Desmond Johnson, and Schuyler Callihan for weekly analysis on the Carolina Panthers!

programme.title: Bleav in Lions
programme.desc: Former Lions All-Pro Glover Quin and 7-time Emmy winner Trevor Thompson break down all the latest buzz around Dan Campbell, Jared Goff, Jahmyr Gibbs, and the Detroit Lions on the Bleav in Lions podcast.

programme.title: Bleav In Bills
programme.desc: Adam Benigni and Sal Maiorana are two of the most experienced reporters in western New York with more than 70 years of experience covering the Buffalo Bills.

programme.title: The Ruffino & Joe Show
programme.desc: Blake Ruffino and Joe DeLeone join forces to talk about the latest in the SEC and College Football

programme.title: Bleav in Bengals
programme.desc: Solomon Wilcots hits the mics to talk Bengals football. After covering the field for the 'Who Dey?' nation

programme.title: Bleav In Commanders
programme.desc: Welcome to the Bleav in Commanders show hosted by former Washington WR Anthony Armstrong and Scott Jackson .We are proud to be a part of the Bleav Podcast Network! We provide insight on the Washington Commanders to the best fan base in the NFL! All content is for the fans, and by the fans. LET’S GO WASHINGTON!

programme.title: Simms Complete
programme.desc: Football is the Simms family business. Join former NFL QB Matt Simms & Super Bowl MVP Phil Simms as they share unique insight on the game they love.

programme.title: See Ball Get Ball
programme.desc: Hosted by David Pollack, a College Football Hall of Famer, three-time First-Team All-American from the University of Georgia, and first-round NFL Draft pick, this podcast provides honest analysis of the most significant stories, matchups, and moments in the world of college football.

programme.title: Bleav in Giants
programme.desc: The broadcast team of commentator Bob Papa and New York Giants legend Carl Banks bring you weekly analysis on your New York Giants.

programme.title: Bleav in Chargers
programme.desc: The greatest fullback in Chargers history Lorenzo Neal hops on the mic with Chargers Play-By-Play Broadcaster Matt "Money" Smith to talk all things Jim Harbaugh, Justin Herbert, and the Los Angeles Chargers.

programme.title: Bleav in Texans
programme.desc: Bleav in Texans is your go-to podcast for everything Houston Texans, hosted by former NFL wide receiver Cecil Shorts III and former defensive tackle and sports radio host Seth Payne.

programme.title: Bleav in Buckeyes
programme.desc: Former Ohio State Football Players Chimdi Chekwa and Bryant Browning talk all things Buckeyes. THE #1 Ohio State Football Podcast out there talking Ryan Day, CJ Stroud, and the rest of the Grey and Scarlet.

programme.title: Bleav in Panthers
programme.desc: Panthers great, Running Back Jonathan Stewart, is joined by Tobacco Road Sports Radio's Desmond Johnson, and Schuyler Callihan for weekly analysis on the Carolina Panthers!

programme.title: Bleav in Lions
programme.desc: Former Lions All-Pro Glover Quin and 7-time Emmy winner Trevor Thompson break down all the latest buzz around Dan Campbell, Jared Goff, Jahmyr Gibbs, and the Detroit Lions on the Bleav in Lions podcast.

programme.title: Bleav In Bills
programme.desc: Adam Benigni and Sal Maiorana are two of the most experienced reporters in western New York with more than 70 years of experience covering the Buffalo Bills.

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Dragon Lord and Mother Brain try to turn every dragon evil The N team rescues Puff a white last good dragon baby

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: The pupils seek out and find Merlin and hell teach the pupil Presto magic if he stays with Merlin Presto decides to stay and attempts a spell to create a way home but the spell summons dragons instead which attack a nearby village

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: The group encounters Sir John a seemingly fearless knight But hes really a coward his village is ready to exile him unless he performs one brave deed Venger captures Sir Johns son and tells him to lead the group into a trap

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Gadget interrupts his holiday in Hawaii to stop MAD from turning it into their latest missile base by pretending that an ancient volcano is still active

programme.desc: The Guardians launch an all-out effort to find and destroy Rogue-Star

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: Orion a professional hunter gets Saw Boss permission to hunt Jayce without any interference Orion is fascinated by Jayces skill and wants him as a trophy prize Orion kidnaps Jayce and puts him on a planet for the hunt to begin

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: In search of a message from Audric Jayce lands on a planet protected by telepathic plants which keep the planet concealed Saw Boss makes a deal with a wicket wizard who has put a sleeping spell on the princess who controls the plants

programme.desc: Sly Rax disguises himself an aboriginal priest VENOM has a machine that causes a giant vortex which they use to kidnap the village people
